text:
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2018
738 GG0170N1_4_STP_STRT_CD GG0170N1_4_STP_STRT_CD GG0170N1 4 Step Start Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to go up and down four steps with or without a rail at the start of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
 07=Resident refused
 09=Not applicable
